name: Samir Kumar Bera
review: The host is very warm. The location is slightly away from the main town centre yet well communicated with local taxis. The breakfast was good. Rooms were well lit and sufficiently big. I would like to stay here again.

name: V S
review: Stayed here for 3 days and I had the best experience ever. The owner is so cordial and will take care of everything you need. It felt more like a home than a hotel. The room was also very clean. One thing which I loved the most was breakfast. They provided custom made breakfast which was yummy.

name: Shobhan G
review: Beautiful bed and breakfast with neat and clean rooms and very warm hosts! Loved the experience overall and special mention of the breakfast which was delicious. Quiet neighborhood but not very far from cafes and other attractions.

name: Atul Pathak
review: A very nice place to stay if you want some quiet time for your yourself...The food is simple and very good. The room is very neat n clean. All basic amenities are available. The owner is also very soft spoken and will try to accommodate your requests.
